policy_justification: High-value calibration shows: 0.01 ETH (direct, n=15) is MARGINAL/LOW_CONFIDENCE. 0.03 ETH (multi, n=40) and 0.05 ETH (multi, n=40) are VIABLE/MEDIUM_CONFIDENCE. Canary policy aligns to the strongest evidence: multi route family at 0.03 ETH. The 0.01 ETH direct bucket is excluded from canary start because it is only MARGINAL.
route_family_blocklist_reason: direct bucket (0.01 ETH, n=15) is MARGINAL/LOW_CONFIDENCE only. Excluded from initial canary to maintain conservative posture.
constraints: No live trading enabled in Phase 22 - policy only
No private orderflow / builder / relay integration
Canary deployment requires separate Phase 23 live-gate sign-off
notes: GO is granted for multi route family at 0.03 ETH. direct route family at 0.01 ETH remains excluded (MARGINAL/LOW_CONFIDENCE). max_trade_size_eth=0.03 is the smallest VIABLE bucket. Direct route re-evaluation deferred to Phase 23 if more cases become available.
